examples: The Wanglang Preserve in western Sichuan is the haunt of the giant panda.
Many a climb, they had together that took them far up, to the bare cliffs near the eagle's haunt.
The pub is a favourite haunt of artists.
There's no point in leaving loose ends which come back to haunt you later.
Now mistakes made as a teenager may haunt an individual for their entire life.
